titleEn: Costs, Lead Time Concerns Leading to More Standardization in Greenhouse Technology
titleZh: 成本与交货期压力推动温室技术标准化趋势
summaryZh: 本文基于对美国国家温室制造商协会（NGMA）成员的调查，探讨了温室制造商在成本上升、利润压缩的背景下，是倾向于标准化产品还是定制化方案。多数受访者表示，为降低工程成本、缩短交货期，正逐步推出标准化基础产品，但大型复杂项目仍需定制。部分企业同时提供两种选项，或通过硬件标准化、软件/服务定制来平衡效率与灵活性。该趋势反映了农业设施行业在自动化、集成化需求下的战略调整。
featuredReason: 温室行业的标准化与定制化博弈，与智慧畜牧中养殖设备、环控系统的模块化、可扩展设计思路高度相通，可为畜牧自动化方案的成本控制与交付效率提供参考。
contentFull: By Brian D. Sparks|June 25, 2026 Greenhouse manufacturers and component suppliers are navigating many of the same pressures as growers. From tighter margins and energy costs to shifting expectations around automation and integration, the forces shaping plant production are shipping the structures and systems behind it. To better understand where the market is headed, Greenhouse Grower surveyed members of the National Greenhouse Manufacturers Association (NGMA), whose products range from greenhouse structures and coverings to controls and lighting systems. Here’s Part 6, where we cover whether manufacturers are standardizing offerings or moving toward more customized solutions. You can find previous parts of the series, which covered geopolitical issues, capital investment trends, energy costs, grower pain points, and overall market challenges and opportunities, here. Are you standardizing offerings more, or moving toward more customized solutions? Why? “We are moving toward more standardized offerings for smaller and lower-cost systems to improve lead times and reduce engineering time. However, large and complex projects still require custom solutions. Our strength as a company is our engineering team and our ability to design the right solution for each customer rather than a one-size-fits-all approach.” — Patricia Dean, Wadsworth Control Systems “We are standardizing towards lower cost, introductory products with the option of going fully custom later.” — Bob Bruns, Link4 Corp. “We are standardizing a base offering to controls costs while somewhat expanding customized solutions at a higher price point.” — Justin Jacobs, Argus Controls Ltd. “Customers keep asking for customized solutions despite our efforts to standardize.” — Adam Pound, AgraTech Inc. “More custom. Research of specific plants requires specific growth habitats. We enjoy the customization.” — Joshua Sucher, Crystal Structures “Both options are available through my company. We have standard off the self-products but also can customize to a degree if they ask for something not standard.” — John Juhler, Vostermans Ventilation Inc. “We standardize the hardware but customize the experience. By nature, we were always custom or tailored to the growers’ needs.” — Kassim Tremblay, Sollum Technologies “We’ve been a custom shop for 35 years. Now we are moving towards some standardizing to improve efficiency and profit.” — Earl Craker, Green-Tek, Inc. “We’re standardizing our core product lines to drive operational efficiency, scalability, and supply chain reliability. However, the market still demands customization, particularly in high-performance greenhouse applications where ROI is tied to precise environmental control and yield optimization. So we’re focused on being efficient at scale while remaining flexible where it matters most.” — Peter Luca Ardizzone, Macrolux USA “We have always provided custom solutions, but costs of goods and labor make you consider standardization.” — Tim Lauer, Albert J. Lauer Inc. “All of our offers are custom to best suit the build.” — Ian Morrell, Climate Control Systems 1 1 5 Costs, Lead Time Concerns Leading to More Standardization in Greenhouse Technology Subscribe to eNewsletter Subscribe Brian D. Sparks is Editor of Greenhouse Grower and GreenhouseGrower.com. See all author stories here.
translationZh:
温室制造商和组件供应商正面临着与种植者相同的压力。从利润空间收窄和能源成本，到对自动化和集成化不断变化的期望，塑造植物生产的各种力量正在改变其背后的结构和系统。为了更好地了解市场走向，《温室种植者》杂志对美国国家温室制造商协会（NGMA）的成员进行了调查，他们的产品涵盖从温室结构和覆盖物到控制系统和照明系统。以下是第六部分，我们探讨制造商是在标准化其产品，还是转向更定制化的解决方案。您可以在此处找到该系列的前几部分，内容涉及地缘政治问题、资本投资趋势、能源成本、种植者痛点以及整体市场挑战与机遇。

**您是否更倾向于标准化产品，还是转向更定制化的解决方案？为什么？**

“我们正朝着为小型和低成本系统提供更多标准化产品的方向发展，以缩短交货期并减少工程时间。然而，大型复杂项目仍然需要定制解决方案。我们公司的优势在于我们的工程团队以及为每位客户设计合适解决方案的能力，而不是采用一刀切的方法。”——帕特里夏·迪恩，Wadsworth Control Systems

“我们正在标准化低成本、入门级产品，同时保留以后完全定制的选项。”——鲍勃·布伦斯，Link4 Corp.

“我们正在标准化基础产品以控制成本，同时在一定程度上以更高的价格点扩展定制化解决方案。”——贾斯汀·雅各布斯，Argus Controls Ltd.

“尽管我们努力标准化，但客户仍然不断要求定制化解决方案。”——亚当·庞德，AgraTech Inc.

“更多定制化。对特定植物的研究需要特定的生长环境。我们享受定制化。”——约书亚·苏彻，Crystal Structures

“我的公司两种选项都提供。我们有标准的现成产品，但如果客户要求非标准的东西，我们也可以在一定程度上进行定制。”——约翰·尤勒，Vostermans Ventilation Inc.

“我们标准化硬件，但定制化体验。从本质上讲，我们一直是根据种植者的需求进行定制或量身定做。”——卡西姆·特伦布莱，Sollum Technologies

“35年来，我们一直是一家定制化工厂。现在我们正朝着标准化的方向发展，以提高效率和利润。”——厄尔·克雷克，Green-Tek, Inc.

“我们正在标准化核心产品线，以提高运营效率、可扩展性和供应链可靠性。然而，市场仍然需要定制化，特别是在高性能温室应用中，投资回报率与精确的环境控制和产量优化息息相关。因此，我们专注于在规模化运营中保持高效，同时在最重要的地方保持灵活性。”——彼得·卢卡·阿尔迪佐内，Macrolux USA

“我们一直提供定制化解决方案，但商品和劳动力成本迫使您考虑标准化。”——蒂姆·劳尔
author: Brian Sparks
contentHtml:
In the sixth part of a series of articles, greenhouse and components manufacturers discuss how they are offering standardized products versus customized solutions.
The post Costs, Lead Time Concerns Leading to More Standardization in Greenhouse Technology appeared first on Greenhouse Grower.
